---
title: "Main"
author: "Elizabet Sanyal"
date: "2023-06-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
packages <- c("reticulate", "tensorflow", "abind", "keras", "xts", "PerformanceAnalytics", "kableExtra", "lubridate", "tidyverse", "purrr")
require(packages)
library(reticulate)
library(tensorflow)
library(abind)
library(keras)
library(xts)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rlang)
library(furrr)
source("custom_nn_keras.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
source("data_preparation.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
source("model_construction.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

load("~/R/Test_GPU/data_ml.RData")

data_ml <- data_ml %>% select(-R3M_Usd,-R6M_Usd,-R12M_Usd)
stock_ids <- levels(as.factor(data_ml$stock_id)) 
stock_days <- data_ml %>%                        
    group_by(stock_id) %>% summarize(nb = n()) 
stock_ids_short <- stock_ids[which(stock_days$nb == max(stock_days$nb))] 
dates <- unique(data_short$date) 
features <- colnames(data_ml[3:95]) 


data_predef_stocks <- process_data(data=data_ml, stock_id_column="stock_id",feature_names=NULL,  label_name="R1M_Usd", use_max_stock_days=TRUE)

data_short_wide <- data_predef_stocks$features_wide
returns_short <- data_predef_stocks$returns_winsorized
returns_short_test <- data_predef_stocks$returns_short_test


data_all_stocks <- process_data(data=data_ml, stock_id_column="stock_id",feature_names=NULL,  label_name="R1M_Usd", use_max_stock_days=FALSE)

data_all_wide <- data_all_stocks$features_wide
returns_all <- data_all_stocks$returns_winsorized
returns_all_test <- data_all_stocks$returns


data_all_wide_imputed <- impute_rowwise(data_all_wide, FUN=median,features)
```



# Backtesting with predefined stocks:
```{r}

 
backtest <- function(t, data_short_wide, returns, simple=TRUE, window="fixed") {
  
  if (window=="fixed"){

    window_data <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[(t-training_window+1):t,])
    window_returns <- as.matrix(returns[(t-training_window+1):t,])
    val_window_data <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[t:(t+val_window),])
    val_returns <- as.matrix(returns[t:(t+val_window),])
    data_predict <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[(t+1+val_window),])
    
  } else {
   
    first <- (training_window+t)%%6+1
    window_data <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[first:(t+training_window),])
    print("that is ")
    print(t)
    print("thats number of training data")
    print(nrow(window_data))
    window_returns <- as.matrix(returns[first:(t+training_window),])
    val_window_data <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[t:(t+val_window),])
    val_returns <- as.matrix(returns[t:(t+val_window),])
    data_predict <- as.matrix(data_short_wide[(t+1+val_window),])
    
    
  }

    
     early_stopping <- callback_early_stopping(monitor = c("val_loss"),
                                               patience = 50,
                                               restore_best_weights = TRUE
                                               )

    lr_callback <- callback_reduce_lr_on_plateau( monitor = 'val_loss',
                                                  factor = 0.01, 
                                                  patience = 10,
                                                  verbose = 1,
                                                  mode = 'auto'
                                                  )
    if (simple==TRUE){
       
      model %>% fit( x = window_data, 
                                   y = window_returns, 
                                   epochs = 50, 
                                   batch_size = 12, 
                                   verbose = 2,  
                                   validation_data = list(val_window_data, val_returns),
                                   shuffle=FALSE,
                                   callbacks = list(early_stopping, lr_callback)
                   )
    
    prediction_w_t <- predict(model, data_predict)
      
    } else {
     
    model %>% fit( x = list(window_data, window_data), 
                                   y = window_returns, 
                                   epochs = 150, 
                                   batch_size = 12, 
                                   verbose = 2,  
                                   validation_data = list(list(val_window_data, val_window_data), val_returns),
                                   shuffle=FALSE,
                                   callbacks = list(early_stopping, lr_callback)
                   )
    
    prediction_w_t <- predict(model, list(data_predict,data_predict))
    }
                              
  return(prediction_w_t)
}


```


## Backtesting with predefined stocks:

```{r}


num_features <- ncol(data_short_wide)
val_window <- 60
training_window <- 60

rate <- 0.1
activation_nl_i <- "sigmoid"
activation_conc <- "swish"
learning_rate <-0.1
activation_nl_ii <-"tanh"
units_choice <- 4

#model <- build_simple_model(rate, units_choice, activation_nl_i, learning_rate, activation_nl_ii, data_short_wide )
model <- build_model(rate, units_choice, activation_nl_i,activation_conc,learning_rate, activation_nl_ii, data_short_wide)
    

testing_periods <-  nrow(data_short_wide)-training_window-val_window
#max possible nrow(data_short_wide)-training_window-val_window

t_values <- seq(60, 60+testing_periods)

backtest_results <- map(t_values, backtest, data_short_wide, returns, FALSE, "expand")

test_sample_returns <- as.matrix(returns_short_test[(training_window+val_window+1):(training_window+val_window+testing_periods+1),])
weights_sample_returns <- do.call(rbind, lapply(backtest_results, unlist))
test_pf_ret <- rowSums(weights_sample_returns *  test_sample_returns)

#Metrics:

mean(test_pf_ret, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(test_pf_ret, na.rm = TRUE)
```
